'''Gann''' was a strong [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ferroan]] living in the [[Middle Distance]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]] after immigrating there nearly [[89 BBY|60 years prior]]. He was an instructor and greeter for those who came to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] to obtain a [[Sekotan Personal Starship]]. He was present when [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] embarked on their [[Mission to Zonama Sekot|mission]] there.<ref name="RP" />
